items.name: UNO-game
items.description: A CLI-based implementation of the "One Card" shedding game in C11. Features complex game logic including cumulative attacks (Rank 2/3), defense mechanics, and action cards (Q/J). Supports multi-player/demo modes, custom deck configurations, and automated logging via a robust 4-layer architectural design.
